description: Devotional Surya Namaskars and asanas offered to Hanumanji. Open to all.
Multiple grand Havan Kunds begin. The sacred fire ritual at the heart of the event.
21 rounds of collective chanting with hundreds of devotees raising their voices as one.
Vibrant bhajans, dance performances and spiritual discourses throughout the day.
A visual journey into the life, teachings and profound impact of Swami Chinmayananda.
Food stalls, children's activities, games, vendor booths and community exhibits.
Curated collection of Vedanta, devotional and children's books.
Talks by Pujya Swami Swaroopananda and other spiritual leaders.
